title: authentication, teams, and collaboration
trigger: a post-MVP multi-user requirement is approved

title: general-purpose workflow or agent builder
trigger: the flagship vertical slice is submitted and a separate product decision approves expansion

title: RAG, vector search, or long-term knowledge management
trigger: a measured retrieval requirement cannot be satisfied by scoped procedural-memory records

title: production database
trigger: fixture and file-backed storage no longer satisfy an approved product requirement

title: additional unrelated demo scenarios
trigger: the flagship scenario is complete, judgeable, and submission-ready
